summary: Comprehensive testing of FPS Calculator app - backend APIs and frontend UI. All 17 backend tests pass. Frontend UI loads correctly with dark gaming theme, all features functional.

issues: GPU tab shows 7 results but only 6 GPU products exist in PRODUCT_CARDS. May be matching extra elements via data-testid selector overlap with best_gpu recommendation cards.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 362: MongoDB insert_one includes '_id' field which stays in MongoDB. The response dict 'doc' is not returned so no serialization issue, but ensure no accidental ObjectId leakage if doc is ever returned.
The GPU tab filter count discrepancy (7 vs expected 6) is minor and likely test selector issue, not a real bug.
FPS cap at 360 is reasonable. Build tier thresholds are sensible.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs functional. Frontend: hero title, FPS cards (4 qualities), bottleneck panel, upgrade recommendations, best GPU/CPU cards, product cards with tab filters, Amazon links all working. Mobile responsive at 375px. Backend URL: https://fps-calculator-6.preview.emergentagent.com
